record.field: Look up member information by name or ID
Look up John Smith Find member Sarah What's Test8's information? Show me details for Mike Who is Jane Doe?
Create a new member named John Smith Add a new student Sarah Jones Register new member Test8 Create a profile for Mike Williams Add a new student Jane Doe with email jane@example.com
Update John's email to john@example.com Change Sarah's phone number Update Test8's name Edit Mike's contact information Update Jane's profile details
Undo the most recent undoable action
Undo that Undo the last action Revert what I just did Go back on that That was a mistake, undo it
Find active members who have not attended in a given number of days
Who hasn't been in for 2 weeks? Show me at-risk members Which members are inactive? Who hasn't come in lately?
Create a new dojo program (e.g., Kids Karate Gold, Adult BJJ)
Create a new program called Adult Kickboxing Add a program for Competition Team Create the Tiny Titans program for toddlers
Update John's instructor profile Set Sarah's speciality to karate Update Mike's bio to highlight his BJJ experience
Add an emergency contact for a member
Add Jane Smith as emergency contact for John Record his mother's phone number as backup contact Add Sarah's guardian contact information
Add a new martial art style to the system
Add Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu as a martial art style Create a new style called Muay Thai Add Taekwondo with code TKD
